title: Very large memory footprint while handling constant arrays

features.name: large unpacked array localparam initialized via function return
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array type used as a localparam and initialized via a function return value in constant evaluation context

features.name: for-loop array element initialization in function for constant evaluation
features.description: Code should include a function that uses a for-loop to initialize array elements, where the function result is used in a constant context (localparam)
